# cloudless_cluster (Data Source)

Look up exactly one cluster by filter criteria. Errors if more than one matches.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cloudless_cluster" "main" {
  region = "DE"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `city_code` (String)
- `id` (String) Explicit cluster UUID.
- `name` (String)
- `region` (String) ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g. DE, PL).

### Read-Only

- `dc_certifications` (List of String)
- `dc_id` (String)
- `dc_slug` (String)
- `dc_tier` (Number)
